name: Chocolate - Peanut Butter Cups (Jello Puddin
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 tablespoons milk and peanut butter until smooth.
2. Fold in whipped topping.
3. Prepare chocolate pudding according to package directions.
4. Place a couple of tablespoons of pudding in a dessert glass, then the peanut butter mix, then more pudding - repeat until the glass is full.
5. Repeat with three more glasses.
Makes 4 servings.
